title: Posting to a company page from a Monday board
excerpt:
Hi there, 
At the moment, you can only post to a person’s individual LinkedIn page via the integration.  Please can we have it so that you can post to company pages via Monday.com? 
Thanks

posts.author: MichelleT (Michelle Thomas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,
At the moment, you can only post to a person’s individual LinkedIn page via the integration. Please can we have it so that you can post to company pages via Monday.com?
Thanks

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: That’s a great suggestion! Have you put it on the feature suggestion board? Feature requests - monday Community Forum

posts.author: 0xm3t1 (Flynn .Is)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, You might want to check out Publisher from the Monday Marketplace. It supports LinkedIn Company Page along with 9 other social platforms, making it one of the best tools for automating your entire social media workflow without ever leaving monday.com.

monday.com

Schedule & publish multichannel social media post templates.

Hope this helps!
